summary_for_llm: Nivo is a Nordic lower-mid-market active owner. We typically screen for product-led, differentiated B2B businesses, roughly ~50–250M SEK revenue (bands vary by strategy in investment_criteria.json), with sustainable margins and defensible growth when the thesis requires it. We deprioritise pure project/installation, generic distribution, hotel/restaurant/property as core, passive holdings, and generic consultancies unless productized. Use only valid universe fields; never fabricate financials. Align suggestions with the canonical thesis document.
